note: Expanded: 31 merchants. Stationary + Nomadic + Isolated merchant coverage complete per Fextralife taxonomy. Remaining out of scope: Pidia, Carian Servant (separate Fextralife category); Patches satellite locations (identical inventory to main); Enia (remembrance-trade mechanic). Chest/world pickups and quest rewards pending separate passes.

merchants.name: Merchant Kalé
merchants.location: Limgrave, Church of Elleh

merchants.name: Twin Maiden Husks
merchants.location: Roundtable Hold
merchants.completeness_note: Bell-bearing-gated inventory with ~300+ items. Each bell bearing (Nomadic Merchant's [1-3], Smithing-Stone Miner's [1-4], Somberstone Miner's [1-5], Rogier's, etc.) unlocks a vendor subset. Sample entries only; full breakdown requires per-bell-bearing harvest.

merchants.name: Miriel, Pastor of Vows
merchants.location: Church of Vows, Liurnia of the Lakes

merchants.name: Brother Corhyn
merchants.location: Roundtable Hold (initial), then Altus Plateau

merchants.name: Sorceress Sellen
merchants.location: Waypoint Ruins (initial), Raya Lucaria Academy (later)

merchants.name: Thops
merchants.location: Church of Irith, Liurnia of the Lakes
merchants.completeness_note: Fextralife wiki table extraction returned only 3 sorceries; needs verification pass.

merchants.name: Knight Bernahl
merchants.location: Warmaster's Shack, Stormhill (initial), Volcano Manor (later)

merchants.name: Patches
merchants.location: Murkwater Cave (primary), plus Liurnia / Volcano Manor appearances
merchants.completeness_note: Inventory consistent across all his shop locations after peace is made.

merchants.name: Sorcerer Rogier
merchants.location: Stormveil Castle (initial), Roundtable Hold (post-Godrick)
merchants.completeness_note: Questline-limited: shop inaccessible once Rogier dies after Ranni questline progression.

merchants.name: Gowry
merchants.location: Gowry's Shack, Caelid
merchants.completeness_note: Shop unlocks progressively through Millicent questline.

inventory.name: Pest Threads
inventory.prereq: After giving Millicent the Valkyrie's Prosthesis

merchants.name: Preceptor Seluvis
merchants.location: Seluvis's Rise, Three Sisters, Liurnia of the Lakes
merchants.completeness_note: Has TWO shops: primary sorceries (runes) + secondary spirit-ash puppets (Starlight Shards currency, unlocked after quest progression).

merchants.name: D, Hunter of the Dead
merchants.location: Roundtable Hold
merchants.completeness_note: Shop unlocks after player visits Gurranq at the Bestial Sanctum.

merchants.name: Gurranq, Beast Clergyman
merchants.location: Bestial Sanctum, Dragonbarrow
merchants.completeness_note: Trades Deathroot (key item currency) for rewards; cumulative counter (1st Deathroot delivered = Clawmark Seal + Beast Eye, 2nd = Bestial Sling, etc.). Also grants Beast Eye on first trade.

merchants.name: Imprisoned Merchant (Mohgwyn)
merchants.location: Mohgwyn Dynasty Mausoleum

merchants.name: Nomadic Merchant West Limgrave
merchants.location: Southeast of Coastal Cave entrance, under collapsed stone structure

merchants.name: Nomadic Merchant East Limgrave
merchants.location: Mistwood campfire, between Mistwood Ruins and Fort Haight

merchants.name: Nomadic Merchant North Limgrave
merchants.location: East of Saintsbridge, campfire by road in Stormhill

merchants.name: Nomadic Merchant West Liurnia of the Lakes
merchants.location: Campfire directly north of Liurnia Lake Shore Site of Grace

merchants.name: Nomadic Merchant North Liurnia of the Lakes
merchants.location: Past Bellum Church hole, beneath rock arch

merchants.name: Nomadic Merchant Castle Morne Rampart
merchants.location: Next to Castle Morne Rampart Site of Grace, Weeping Peninsula

merchants.name: Nomadic Merchant Caelid South
merchants.location: Southern Caelid Highway campfire junction
merchants.completeness_note: Cracked Pot inventory slot may be unavailable if player selected Cracked Pot as starting keepsake.

merchants.name: Nomadic Merchant Caelid Highway North
merchants.location: East of Caelid Highway North Site of Grace, campfire

merchants.name: Nomadic Merchant Mt. Gelmir
merchants.location: Ledge halfway up Mt. Gelmir, via ladders from Primeval Sorcerer Azur or Ninth Mt. Gelmir Campsite

merchants.name: Nomadic Merchant West Altus Plateau
merchants.location: Next to Forest-Spanning Greatbridge Site of Grace

merchants.name: Abandoned Merchant Siofra River
merchants.location: Ruins in Central Siofra River, accessible via eastern wooden scaffolding

merchants.name: Hermit Merchant Ainsel River
merchants.location: Stone ruins in southwestern Ainsel River, by campfire

merchants.name: Hermit Merchant Leyndell
merchants.location: Hermit Merchant's Shack, Capital Outskirts north of Leyndell

merchants.name: Hermit Merchant Mountaintops East
merchants.location: South of Stargazers' Ruins, Mountaintops of the Giants

merchants.name: Isolated Merchant Weeping Peninsula
merchants.location: Isolated Merchant's Shack, far west of Weeping Peninsula

merchants.name: Isolated Merchant Raya Lucaria
merchants.location: Southeast bridge past Main Academy Gate Site of Grace

merchants.name: Isolated Merchant Dragonbarrow
merchants.location: Isolated Merchant's Shack, western Dragonbarrow
